overview: A full-featured admin dashboard with authentication, real-time metrics, user management, and content management — all in a clean, responsive layout with dark/light mode support.
features: Internet Identity login with access control
Overview with 4 key metric cards that auto-refresh
Global search across users and content
Users table with sort, filter, and detail panel
Content management table with publish/unpublish actions
Dark/light mode toggle persisted across sessions
